summary:
Iteration 4 frontend review for FisioAgenda Pro (Integrações tab + Pix UI + WhatsApp test card). Live UI testing was BLOCKED because Supabase auth returned 400/401 for the documented super_admin credentials (kaiohhenrique21@gmail.com / Admin123#). The login form itself is wired correctly (auth.tsx -> signInWithPassword -> navigate /dashboard), but Supabase rejected the credentials repeatedly (network 400 + 401 captured). Verified everything else via code review.

CODE-REVIEW RESULTS:
- configuracoes.tsx: 'Integrações' tab is added between 'Aparência' and 'Logs' (line 49) — order: Clínica, Usuários, Aparência, Integrações, Logs, Relatórios. IntegrationsTab renders 2 cards. ✓
- Pix card: 'Cobrança Pix automática' heading + Ativar/Desativar button (default 'Ativar' when pix_enabled=false) + helper text mentioning MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN secret. ✓
- WhatsApp card: 'Lembretes WhatsApp automáticos' heading + Ativar/Desativar button + Input with placeholder '(64) 99999-9999 — número para teste' + 'Testar agora' button disabled={testing || !testPhone} + helper text mentioning EVOLUTION_API_URL, EVOLUTION_API_KEY, EVOLUTION_INSTANCE, and /app/memory/DEPLOY_GUIDE.md. ✓
- PackagesTab.tsx (lines 301-312): 'Cobrar via Pix' button rendered conditionally on p.payment_method === 'Pix' AND p.payment_status !== 'pago'. 'Marcar como pago' rendered for any payment_status !== 'pago'. Correct condition. ✓

CRITICAL BUG: PackagesTab.tsx is missing two imports — `QrCode` from lucide-react (used line 305) and `PixCheckoutModal` from '@/components/PixCheckoutModal' (used line 329). Today this is a dead code path (session_packages table not provisioned, list stays empty), so the UI does not crash. The moment the migration is applied OR a Pix-method package is rendered, the component will throw 'QrCode is not defined' / 'PixCheckoutModal is not defined' and the entire Pacotes tab will white-screen.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing imports: `QrCode` (lucide-react) and `PixCheckoutModal` (@/components/PixCheckoutModal). Will throw ReferenceError when a Pix-method package is rendered (i.e., after the session_packages migration is applied or as soon as any package with payment_method='Pix' exists).

integration_issues.issue: POST to Supabase /auth/v1/token returns 400 then GET /auth/v1/user returns 401 for kaiohhenrique21@gmail.com / Admin123#. The toast is suppressed because navigation is not triggered (signIn returns toast.error on error, but the toast component was not visible on screen during automation). Could be a stale password, lockout, or expired Supabase project credentials. NOT a code bug — credentials/Supabase issue. Verify by trying manual login.

action_items: (CRITICAL) Add the two missing imports to /app/frontend/src/components/clinical/PackagesTab.tsx: change `import { Plus, Package, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react";` to include `QrCode`, and add `import { PixCheckoutModal } from "@/components/PixCheckoutModal";`. Without this fix, the Pacotes tab will white-screen the second a Pix package is rendered.

(HIGH) Verify Supabase super_admin credentials. /app/memory/test_credentials.md still says Admin123# but Supabase rejects it with 400/401. Either reset the password in Supabase Auth UI or update the memory file. Iteration 3 reported login worked, so the password may have been changed externally.

(INFO) Live verification of the Integrações tab UI was not possible due to the auth block. All assertions are based on source-of-truth code review of configuracoes.tsx lines 379-480. Once login is fixed, a quick smoke pass (1 click on each tab + 1 visibility check on each helper text string) is sufficient.
critical_code_review_comments: PackagesTab.tsx is missing imports for QrCode and PixCheckoutModal — see action_items above.

IntegrationsTab silently swallows the 'relation does not exist' Supabase error for integration_settings (good — consistent with PackagesTab pattern from iteration 3). However, when settings is the fallback object {whatsapp_reminders_enabled:false, pix_enabled:false}, the toggleWA/togglePix update calls run against `.eq('id', undefined)` which Supabase will reject. Once the migration is applied this is fine; before the migration the toggle buttons are effectively no-ops with a toast error. Acceptable for iteration 4 but worth a fallback insert-if-missing.

sendTest() invokes the 'send-reminder' Edge Function — main agent already flagged this as MOCKED (function not deployed). The current error path (`if (error) return toast.error(error.message)`) is fine; user will see 'Edge Function returned a non-2xx status code' which matches expectations.
configuracoes.tsx is now 482 lines — still under the 700-line soft cap but consider splitting IntegrationsTab into its own file when it grows.
ConfirmDialog regression for /agenda delete: still imported and used in agenda.tsx (verified in iteration 3). No regression in iteration 4 — file not touched.

All interactive controls in IntegrationsTab lack data-testid attributes. Recommend adding data-testid='integrations-tab-trigger', 'pix-toggle-btn', 'wa-toggle-btn', 'wa-test-phone-input', 'wa-test-send-btn' for stable testing.

success_rate.frontend: Code review 100% (all 7 review items confirmed in source). Live UI verification 0% — blocked by Supabase auth 400/401.

test_credentials: kaiohhenrique21@gmail.com / Admin123# — REJECTED by Supabase (HTTP 400 on /auth/v1/token + HTTP 401 on /auth/v1/user). Iteration 3 reported same credentials working — likely externally changed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: If credentials are fixed, the live smoke test is: login → /configuracoes → click 'Integrações' tab → verify visibility of: 'Cobrança Pix automática', 'Lembretes WhatsApp automáticos', 'MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN', 'EVOLUTION_API_URL', 'EVOLUTION_API_KEY', 'EVOLUTION_INSTANCE', 'DEPLOY_GUIDE.md', input placeholder '(64) 99999-9999', and 'Testar agora' button disabled state. The Pacotes Cobrar-via-Pix path cannot be exercised end-to-end without (a) the session_packages migration AND (b) the QrCode+PixCheckoutModal imports added. Patient list (Ana Clara linda, Kaio Teste, Maria Gouveia, Teste de Gay) and 14-tab patient profile order from iteration 3 should also be re-verified.
rca of the issue:
Two distinct issues:

(1) Missing imports in PackagesTab.tsx. Reproduction (after migration applied): create a package with payment_method='Pix' → the conditional render at line 303-307 evaluates true → `QrCode` resolves to undefined → React throws 'Element type is invalid' → entire Pacotes tab crashes via ErrorBoundary or white-screens. Same will happen when `setPixOpen(true)` opens the JSX at line 328-338 (`PixCheckoutModal` is undefined). Mitigation: add the two missing imports — single-line fix.

(2) Supabase auth 400/401. Reproduction: load /auth → enter kaiohhenrique21@gmail.com / Admin123# → click Entrar → network tab shows POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password → 400, then GET /auth/v1/user → 401 → user stays on /auth. The signIn() handler in /app/frontend/src/routes/auth.tsx is correct (await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword + navigate({to:'/dashboard'}) only on success). The 400 response from Supabase means 'invalid_grant' (bad email/password) — likely the password was changed since iteration 3. Mitigation: reset the super_admin password in Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users, OR update /app/memory/test_credentials.md with the new password.
